description_long: This object is a round pizza with a green outer rim representing the crust, a red inner circle for the sauce, and a generous layer of white shredded cheese scattered across the surface. Large, round slices of pepperoni are distributed evenly on top, each with visible white specks to indicate seasoning. The pizza is flat and appears to be a single, uncut piece, with no visible slice lines. There is a bold, black text partially visible on the surface, spelling out 'PIZZA' in a playful font, with the letters oriented toward one edge. The pizza has a cartoonish, stylized appearance, with exaggerated toppings and bright, saturated colors. No packaging or tray is present, and the pizza is depicted as a standalone item.
description: A stylized, round pizza with a green crust, red sauce, white shredded cheese, and large pepperoni slices, featuring bold 'PIZZA' text on top.
description_view_0: The pizza is viewed from the front, showing the 'PIZZA' text most clearly and the full arrangement of toppings.
description_view_1: The pizza is seen from a left angle, with the 'PIZZA' text partially visible and the pepperoni slices prominent on the right side.
description_view_2: The pizza is viewed from the back, with the 'PIZZA' text mostly obscured and the toppings evenly distributed across the surface.
description_view_3: The pizza is seen from a right angle, with the 'PIZZA' text running vertically and the pepperoni slices concentrated toward the left.
